dismissalText.commentary: Sanju Samson c Choudhary b Akash Singh 20 (20b 3x4 0x6 29m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: whipped straight to deep square leg, and the chit comes out again! Back of a length on the pads, and this is there to be put away. Samson, though, has a half-hearted pop at it. Not enough of a flourish or follow-through either, and Samson could not have picked out Mukul better. Akash points to his head while also showing the chit, and LSG are applying the squeeze now!

dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad c Pooran b Akash Singh 13 (9b 2x4 0x6 20m) SR: 144.44

dismissalComment.html: clothed tamely to mid on, and Akash has something to show for his early toil! Hard length just outside off and this skids through. Gaikwad looks for the pull but is late on the stroke because of the extra pace and bounce. Off the splice and mid on does the rest. Akash brings out a celebratory chit too (although not sure what was on it) and Gaikwad departs early again!

dismissalText.commentary: Urvil Patel c Marsh b Akash Singh 6 (7b 1x4 0x6 23m) SR: 85.71

dismissalComment.html: swatted straight to deep mid wicket, and the chit makes its third appearance! Banged in short outside off and this sits up, which makes Urvil's eyes light up. Urvil gets decent purchase on the pull but does not muster the elevation or the requisite direction. Straight to Marsh, and Akash is having a field day, as is the chit in his pocket!

dismissalText.commentary: Kartik Sharma c Markram b Shahbaz Ahmed 71 (42b 6x4 5x6 61m) SR: 169.04

dismissalComment.html: shanked a touch, and Shahbaz has the last laugh! Speared in full on leg, and this keeps on coming with the angle. Kartik cannot quite get under it fully and arrows it flat to Markram at long on. Kartik throws his head back in disappointment, and LSG will breathe a sigh of relief!

dismissalText.commentary: Dewald Brevis c Akash Singh b Mohammed Shami 25 (16b 0x4 2x6 37m) SR: 156.25

dismissalComment.html: goes straight up, and Brevis bites the dust! Shortish just outside off and this rears up ever so slightly. Gets big on Brevis as he swipes at it and he only gets height on it. No distance at all and Akash, circling under it at short fine leg, makes no mistake. Big, big wicket for LSG, given how Brevis had begun striking the ball!

dismissalText.commentary: Ruturaj Gaikwad c Pooran b Akash Singh 13 (9b 2x4 0x6 20m) SR: 144.44

dismissalComment.html: clothed tamely to mid on, and Akash has something to show for his early toil! Hard length just outside off and this skids through. Gaikwad looks for the pull but is late on the stroke because of the extra pace and bounce. Off the splice and mid on does the rest. Akash brings out a celebratory chit too (although not sure what was on it) and Gaikwad departs early again!

dismissalText.commentary: Sanju Samson c Choudhary b Akash Singh 20 (20b 3x4 0x6 29m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: whipped straight to deep square leg, and the chit comes out again! Back of a length on the pads, and this is there to be put away. Samson, though, has a half-hearted pop at it. Not enough of a flourish or follow-through either, and Samson could not have picked out Mukul better. Akash points to his head while also showing the chit, and LSG are applying the squeeze now!

dismissalComment.html: swatted straight to deep mid wicket, and the chit makes its third appearance! Banged in short outside off and this sits up, which makes Urvil's eyes light up. Urvil gets decent purchase on the pull but does not muster the elevation or the requisite direction. Straight to Marsh, and Akash is having a field day, as is the chit in his pocket!

dismissalText.commentary: Dewald Brevis c Akash Singh b Mohammed Shami 25 (16b 0x4 2x6 37m) SR: 156.25

dismissalComment.html: goes straight up, and Brevis bites the dust! Shortish just outside off and this rears up ever so slightly. Gets big on Brevis as he swipes at it and he only gets height on it. No distance at all and Akash, circling under it at short fine leg, makes no mistake. Big, big wicket for LSG, given how Brevis had begun striking the ball!
